_note: Chapter 5 — Bobby in the Projects with Beauvoir, Lucas, Jackie, Rhea; deck back from Two-a-Day; leave with Lucas.

c5_recovery.name: Recovery Room
c5_recovery.desc: You wake on a fold-out table under a hand-stitched quilt, bandaged by someone who knew what they were doing. The window looks out from a height Barrytown doesn't have: you're up in the Projects, where nobody from the Courts ever goes twice.

c5_altar.name: Hounfor — Altar Room
c5_altar.desc: Candles, chromed vévé traced in flour on the floor, a bottle of rum beside a keyboard older than you are. Beauvoir calls it a hounfor — a server room for gods. He says both words like they mean the same thing, because to him they do.

interactions.label: Study the altar's circuitry
pages: Copper traces disappear beneath flour symbols and return beside candles burned down over old circuit boards. Nothing here separates ritual from engineering. Each offering is also an interface, each name also an address. The arrangement makes your deck look less advanced, not more.

interactions.label: Study the Projects map
pages: A hand-drawn wall map turns the supposedly empty towers into kitchens, workshops, schools, markets, and hounfors. Barrytown occupies one tired corner below. You spent your life imagining the Projects as a void; the map shows a city doing business with intelligences the corporations insist do not exist.

c5_kitchen.name: Rhea's Kitchen
c5_kitchen.desc: Steam, scotch bonnet, a radio playing dub at conversation volume. Jackie shells peas at the table with the unhurried grace of someone who is also, on other nights, a horse for gods to ride.

c5_gallery.name: Projects Gallery — View of Barrytown
c5_gallery.desc: A windowed walkway a kilometer up. Barrytown is a circuit board below, the Sprawl a glow on the horizon like a permanent dawn. A public terminal hums by the rail.

c5_twoaday.name: Two-a-Day's Apartment
c5_twoaday.desc: Leather, chrome, a wall of fish tanks, and Two-a-Day himself looking significantly less rich and significantly more scared than he did in Barrytown. Your deck sits on his coffee table like evidence.

c5_elevator.name: Down Elevator
c5_elevator.desc: The doors stand open on a car big enough for freight. Lucas waits inside in a suit the color of midnight, holding a cane he doesn't need, patient as a scheduled eclipse.
